description.full: Namco Museum: Virtual Arcade is one of Namco Bandai's numerous retro game collections. This particular one collects together all of their current Xbox Live Arcade releases as well as a selection of other '80s arcade titles, for a total of 34 games.
description.short: Namco Museum: Virtual Arcade is one of Namco Bandai's numerous retro game collections. This particular one collects together all of their current Xbox Live Arcade releases as well as a selection of other '80s arcade titles, for a total of 34 games.
